title: Tuition Hub BD
description: A comprehensive platform to manage tuition hubs — tracking students, attendance, fees, and hub statistics in one centralized digital solution.
fullDescription: TutorFlow is a full-featured tuition hub management system built to eliminate the hassle of manual record-keeping. It provides tuition center owners, individual tutors, and educational institutions with a streamlined dashboard to manage student profiles, mark daily attendance, monitor fee payments, and view hub-wide statistics. Built with React, TypeScript, and Firebase, TutorFlow delivers a responsive and real-time experience that lets educators focus on teaching rather than administration.
features: Student Management: Maintain detailed student profiles including class, contact info, and enrollment data.
Attendance Tracking: Mark and review daily attendance with full historical records.
Fee Management: Monitor pending payments and view complete payment histories.
Dashboard Overview: Get real-time hub statistics and a summary of recent activities.
challenges: Scalable Firestore structure for multiple batches and students.
Real-time attendance sync without excessive Firestore read costs.
Intuitive UI for non-technical tuition center owners.
Secure role-based access for different user types.
Efficient fee tracking across many students simultaneously.
solutions: Hierarchical Firestore structure: hubs → batches → students.
Firestore listeners with optimistic UI to minimize reads.
Clean Tailwind + Framer Motion UI with low learning curve.
Firebase Authentication with role-based access control.
Centralized fee module with real-time payment state sync.
results: Eliminated manual attendance and fee record-keeping.
Single dashboard for all hub operations.
Real-time data sync with Firebase Firestore.
Secure, role-based login for tutors and admins.
Scalable foundation ready for parent portal and notifications.

timeline.title: Planning & Design
timeline.detail: Defined requirements and designed Firestore data model and UI wireframes.

timeline.title: Authentication & Setup
timeline.detail: Configured Vite + React + TypeScript, integrated Firebase Auth and Firestore.

timeline.title: Student Management
timeline.detail: Built student profiles, enrollment flow, and batch management modules.

timeline.title: Attendance Tracking
timeline.detail: Implemented daily attendance marking with real-time Firestore sync.

timeline.title: Fee Management & Dashboard
timeline.detail: Developed fee monitoring, payment history, and hub statistics dashboard.

timeline.title: Polish & Deployment
timeline.detail: Added Framer Motion animations, responsive UI refinements, and deployed production build.
